features.name: Backend startup
features.description: Backend starts correctly with config.py, .env, and agent harness files

features.name: Database initialization
features.description: SQLite database creates tables correctly on startup

features.name: RAG knowledge base
features.description: ChromaDB loads and queries knowledge base

features.name: DeepSeek chat
features.description: Chat endpoint returns LLM responses via DeepSeek API

features.name: Meal recording
features.description: record_agent extracts meal data and saves to database

features.name: Nutrition API
features.description: GET /api/nutrition/today returns daily nutrition summary

features.name: Recipe generation
features.description: POST /api/recipe generates personalized recipes

features.name: Memory summary
features.description: GET /api/memory/summary returns 7-day health summary

features.name: Streaming chat (SSE)
features.description: POST /api/chat/stream returns Server-Sent Events for real-time response

features.name: Markdown rendering
features.description: Frontend renders Markdown in chat messages and recipes

features.name: Citation panel
features.description: Chat shows RAG source citations when available

features.name: Recipe persistence
features.description: Recipes auto-save, persist across sessions, and respect daily refresh logic

features.name: Export functionality
features.description: Recipes can be exported as PNG/PDF

features.name: Frontend startup
features.description: Next.js dev server starts without errors

features.name: End-to-end chat
features.description: User can send message and receive streaming response with Markdown
features.notes: Fixed by simplifying RECORD_TOOLS to stay under Windows request size limit (~1200 bytes)

features.name: Toast notification
features.description: Show toast notification when food/exercise is recorded successfully

features.name: Progress bar colors
features.description: Nutrition progress bars change color: green (ok), yellow (near limit), red (exceeded)

features.name: History modal
features.description: Modal to view today's meal and exercise records

features.name: Food options API
features.description: GET /api/food-options returns categorized food recommendations

features.name: Quick record API
features.description: POST /api/quick-record batch records multiple foods with nutrition data

features.name: FoodOptionsModal
features.description: Modal showing categorized food recommendations (read-only)

features.name: QuickRecordModal
features.description: Modal for selecting and batch recording foods with nutrition preview

features.name: Enhanced delete mechanism
features.description: delete_meal_by_name (by food name), delete_last_blood_sugar, improved system prompts

features.name: Frontend code refactoring
features.description: Refactored page.tsx (1219 lines → 306 lines) into modular structure: types, services, hooks, components
features.notes: Created 20 files: 5 hooks, 13 components, 1 service layer, 1 types file. Build successful, all functionality preserved.

features.name: Chat history system
features.description: Backend database (chat_sessions, chat_messages) + localStorage cache + ChatHistoryModal
features.notes: Fixed route ordering bug (/api/chat/session/today must come before /{session_id}). Auto-saves messages to backend, loads from localStorage on refresh, supports viewing/loading/deleting sessions

features.name: Nutrition trends charts
features.description: 7/30-day nutrition trend charts with Recharts, integrated into NutritionPanel
features.notes: Backend endpoints verified working. Shows calories/fat/carbs/protein trends, displays stats (avg, max, days over limit)

features.name: Admin management panel
features.description: Password-protected admin console with system stats and knowledge base reload
features.notes: Fixed Header import and alias. AdminButton in header, password modal, stats display (meals/exercises/sessions/messages/db size)

features.name: Mobile optimizations
features.description: 44x44px touch targets, responsive food grid, swipe-to-delete gestures
features.notes: Optimized button sizes, single/dual column food cards, left-swipe delete with react-swipeable

features.name: UI improvements - Recipe modal close button
features.description: Added × close button to recipe modal header for easier closing without scrolling
features.notes: Close button added alongside export buttons in recipe header

features.name: UI improvements - Admin button text label
features.description: Admin button shows '⚙️ 管理' on desktop, only '⚙️' on mobile
features.notes: Responsive text label with CSS media queries

features.name: UI improvements - Admin password modal description
features.description: Added clear description in admin password modal explaining panel features
features.notes: Shows: 管理面板功能：查看系统统计、重载知识库、管理数据

features.name: UI improvements - Mobile hamburger menu
features.description: Mobile (<768px) uses hamburger menu, desktop shows all 5 buttons in header
features.notes: Slide-in menu from right with smooth animations, all functions accessible on mobile

features.name: React Hooks error fix
features.description: Fixed 'Rendered fewer hooks than expected' error by extracting SwipeableListItem component
features.notes: useSwipeable hook moved from map loop to separate component, compliant with React Rules of Hooks

features.name: Server deployment configuration
features.description: PM2 ecosystem config for production deployment with proper port management and process monitoring
features.notes: Created ecosystem.config.js and DEPLOYMENT.md guide. Needs server-side testing.

features.name: Calculator page scrolling fix
features.description: Fixed calculator page scrolling by changing minHeight to height with overflow auto
features.notes: Changed outer container from minHeight: 100vh to height: 100vh + overflow: auto

features.name: Calculator data synchronization
features.description: Fixed nutrition data sync between calculator and main page using URL parameters
features.notes: Calculator redirects to /?refresh=nutrition after applying, main page listens and refreshes nutrition data
